name: Apple Phyllo Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the finely chopped apples, lemon juice, grated cheddar cheese, and minced chives.
2. Set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Cut each sheet of phyllo dough in half lengthwise and into fourths crosswise, forming 32 squares measuring 6 x 4 inches.
5. Lay one square of phyllo on a sheet of waxed paper.
6. Brush lightly with melted butter.
7. Repeat with two more squares of phyllo.
8. Place about 2 tablespoons of the filling in the center of each square.
9. Bring up the opposite corners of the square and pinch to form a "kiss".
10. Repeat with the remaining phyllo dough (you should have 8 filled pastries).
11. Transfer the pastries to a lightly buttered baking sheet.
12. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
13. Serve warm.
